raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a merchant called XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX 's XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX FL ) charged my American Express card {$670.00} for an annual membership auto-renewal without providing any advance notice. 
I immediately canceled the membership the same day upon discovering the charge. The merchant refuses to refund, claiming I " opened emails '' ( which is not service usage ) and stating that their website disclosed auto-renewal terms. 
The merchant 's Terms of Service contain a clause stating customers " agree not to dispute any charges, '' attempting to waive my rights under the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 
I have disputed this charge with American Express. I am very thankful that the dispute is temporarily resolved in my favor, but I am concerned the merchant will contest it because of their email responses to me. I am filing this complaint to document : XXXX. No advance renewal notice was provided for a {$670.00} charge XXXX. I canceled immediately upon discovery ( same day ) XXXX. XXXX 's terms include unenforceable provisions waiving dispute rights XXXX. This appears to be a deceptive automatic renewal practice I have also filed complaints with the Florida Attorney General, FTC, and BBB.
